case_title: DENG XIA ET AL VS. ROMEL ENTERPRISES,LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFFS DENG XIA AND VIVIAN ZHOU ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROMEL ENTERPRISES, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KIMBERLY WELCH (MANAGER). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40. SERVED AUG-01-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROMEL ENTERPRISES,LLC
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING [HEARING 08-28-23 AT 3:30PM] (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF XIA, DENG
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,444.00 FILED BY XIA, DENG ZHOU, VIVIAN AS TO DEFENDANT ROMEL ENTERPRISES,LLC

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR AMENDED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER, DECLARATION. (FEE FOR SERVICE:($40.00); SERVED BY SHERIFF'S DEPT. SERVED SEP-19-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROMEL ENTERPRISES,LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XIA, DENG ZHOU, VIVIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROMEL ENTERPRISES,LLC $1,050.00 PRINCIPAL, $190.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,240.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFFS $1,050.00 FOR THE RETURN OF PLAINTIFFS' SECURITY DEPOSIT. THE COURT FINDS NO BAD FAITH ON THE PART OF DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,060.00 FILED BY XIA, DENG ZHOU, VIVIAN AS TO DEFENDANT ROMEL ENTERPRISES,LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
